CONFIRMATION OF TELEPHONIC COURT APPEARANCE FOR APRIL 18, 2008 FILED BY DEFENDANT TRI POLE CORPORATION, A CALIFORNIA

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT NOVEL, INC.'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING: SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. PLAINTIFF'S RIGHT TO FEES WAS REJECTED BY THIS COURT ON JANUARY 18, 2008. THE RIGHT TO ATTORNEY'S FEES IS LINKED TO THE RIGHT TO INDEMNIFICATION AND THAT RIGHT DOES NOT EXIST BASED ON THE CLAIMS MADE IN THE PRIOR CASE. PREVAILING PARTY IS TO SUBMIT A FORM OF ORDER.(302/PJM) JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600
